title: Feature request: support SV array query functions like $high and $left

features.name: range bounds using $high and $low with addition
features.description: Code should include a packed array range specification using $high and $low functions with arithmetic expressions in the bounds

features.name: array indexing using $high function
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array slice indexing using $high function as part of the range specification

features.name: signed packed array with negative bounds
features.description: Code should include a packed array declaration with negative lower bound to create a signed fractional number representation
